purpose: Heats, froths, and dispenses milk for coffee beverages with quality and hygiene monitoring

inputs.name: steam_flow
inputs.description: Steam pressure for milk heating and frothing

outputs.name: frothed_milk
outputs.description: Flow rate of processed frothed milk

states.name: milk_quality
states.description: Milk quality degrading with temperature exposure and time

states.name: hygiene_level
states.description: Milk system hygiene degrading with contamination buildup

states.name: actual_temperature
states.description: Actual milk temperature following target temperature

events.name: lactose_cross_contamination
events.description: Cannot guarantee lactose-free milk on tank #2 when using dual milk types

parameters.name: milk_quality_degradation_time
parameters.description: Time constant for milk quality degradation

parameters.name: hygiene_degradation_time
parameters.description: Time constant for hygiene level degradation

parameters.name: temperature_stress_factor
parameters.description: Factor relating temperature to milk quality degradation

parameters.name: base_flow_rate
parameters.description: Base milk flow rate when healthy

parameters.name: foam_efficiency_factor
parameters.description: Factor relating foam texture to flow rate

parameters.name: hygiene_threshold
parameters.description: Hygiene level threshold for contamination warning

state_transition_logic: milk_quality decreases by (1.0 / milk_quality_degradation_time) * temperature_stress_factor * max(1.0, stop_temperature / 65.0) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
hygiene_level decreases by (1.0 / hygiene_degradation_time) * contamination_rate_factor * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
actual_temperature approaches milk_temperature_setting using first-order lag with coefficient temperature_tracking_coeff, clamped to [0.0, 100.0]
output_logic: frothed_milk = base_flow_rate * milk_quality * hygiene_level * (milk_quantity / 100.0) * (1.0 + foam_texture * foam_efficiency_factor) * min(1.0, steam_flow / 0.8)
assumptions: Milk quality degrades faster at higher temperatures
Hygiene level degrades continuously with system usage
Steam flow affects frothing efficiency linearly
Foam texture setting enhances milk flow rate
Cross-contamination risk increases as hygiene degrades
